questions.question: What is the main advantage of threshold signatures over traditional multisig wallets?
options: Threshold signatures are faster to compute
Threshold signatures hide the signing structure and produce one compact signature
Threshold signatures don't require any coordination
Threshold signatures are easier to implement
questions.correctAnswer: Threshold signatures hide the signing structure and produce one compact signature

questions.question: Key shares in a threshold system can be periodically refreshed while keeping the same public key.
How does dcipher enable cross-chain coordination using threshold signatures?
options: By creating separate signatures for each blockchain
By using a single committee that can monitor multiple chains and sign for any of them
By requiring each chain to validate the threshold
By converting signatures between different blockchain formats
questions.correctAnswer: By using a single committee that can monitor multiple chains and sign for any of them

questions.question: In threshold cryptography, trust is distributed ______ rather than through social agreements.
Which cryptographic signature scheme is commonly used in threshold systems because of its aggregatable property?
Threshold signatures completely eliminate the need for trust in decentralized systems.
What is one real-world application of threshold signatures mentioned for dcipher?
options: MEV prevention through encrypted mempools with time-based decryption
questions.correctAnswer: MEV prevention through encrypted mempools with time-based decryption
